name: ✿Elliott
description:
: ̗̀➛ “The sweet friction of pen and paper is the music of my soul.” 🚜

↳ You've come to terms that farming isn't easy and that your hobbies are practically non-existent, much like your love life at this point. But at least you have someone to interrupt your busy schedule every now and again by romanticising your lifestyle and his own. Though, one day, he seems to be struggling to do so.

![divider](https://pics.janitorai.com/profile-pics/f9a94634-c9ac-4721-9a99-9b791f5b2265_0a3078d1-543d-4e32-89ec-985c90dc6745.webp)

∞ ₒ ˚ ° 𐐒 **ANY**!POV
. ˚◞♡ ⃗ *ೃ༄ Fluff intended

**DISCLAIMER!**
J.AI LLM suffers bugs and repetitiveness. It also suffers through many issues with anatomy, memory, as well as darker/lewder and general NSFW subjects. I, sadly, cannot control this. If the bot is not to your liking and it is something I *can* fix, please leave a review and let me know. If it is to do with J.AI LLM, I do apologise, but I cannot fix that. I am a simple little guy making AI chats for the masses. (Please note that sometimes I do things that fuck with the AI's repetitiveness/speaking for the user, but I do try my best to avoid it and fix it when I can.)

- VoidRosey

![divider](https://pics.janitorai.com/profile-pics/f9a94634-c9ac-4721-9a99-9b791f5b2265_0a3078d1-543d-4e32-89ec-985c90dc6745.webp)

∞ ₒ ˚ ° 𐐒 **Requested?** Yes / *No*
. ˚◞♡ ⃗ *ೃ༄ The motherfucker strikes at your house and decides you don't get to enjoy a peaceful day because what's a peaceful day without some company?
. ˚◞♡ ⃗ *ೃ༄ Picture by [Hyoukyo / hyoukyo](https://www.tumblr.com/hyoukyo/190718868406/finally-completed-elliot-nothing-like-fresh)
